title: polygala viridis
intro: Polygala viridis, also known as Green Polygala or Green Milkwort, is a plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. Traditionally, Polygala viridis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant activity, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, bronchitis, and coughs. Polygala viridis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
